content.en:
Void Forbidden Realm.

Many forces have more than one half-step domain ancestor, and there are even more half-step domain ancestors of the human race, Black Wind Mountain, and Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Soon, the powerful half-step domain ancestor disappeared.

At the beginning, the disappearance of one of the two half-step domain ancestors did not cause any waves, after all, the half-step domain ancestor divine dragon saw the head and the end, and it was normal for him to disappear for a while.

But if someone can't contact the half-step domain ancestor, and the half-step domain ancestor can't be contacted, the half-step domain ancestor level communicates a little, and he immediately knows that something big is wrong.

this day.

A half-step domain ancestor of the Terran has disappeared.

This news contacted Ye Tian for the first time.

"A new half-step domain ancestor is missing and can't be contacted?"

Ye Tian immediately thought of the Vast Sea Ancestors and those foreign domain ancestors.

The Vast Sea Ancestor should not dare to attack the half-step Domain Ancestor of the Human Race, otherwise he would be looking for death.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace knew part of his strength, after all, his record was in the Battle Realm Tower, and as long as the Heavenly Emperor Palace was not stupid, it would not take the initiative to offend him.

Therefore, the biggest possibility is that those newcomers to the Domain Ancestors did not know much about the situation, and they misjudged his strength, or did not believe it, so they dared to attack the half-step Domain Ancestors of the Terran race.

As for the purpose of these domain ancestors, he didn't know for the time being.

But—

"You're looking for death!"

Ye Tian left the human realm and came to the side of the Battle Realm Tower.

His copying talent has always shrouded this area, and once a domain ancestor appears, he won't say a word, just catch it.

At first, Ye Tian didn't find these domain ancestors.

But he believed that these domain ancestors were either inside the Battle Boundary Tower, or they would come to the Battle Boundary Tower.

After all, anyone is very interested in the Dark Sanctuary, and it is impossible not to enter the War Realm Tower.

this day.

A domain ancestor came out of the War Realm Tower.

This domain ancestor is none other than the Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor.

After the Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor came out of the Battle Realm Tower, he left this Forbidden Void Realm, but before he could leave far, he was stopped by Ye Tian.

"Returning to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, hehe, I just spent my points, and you sent it to the door again!"

The Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor grabbed it with one hand, trying to grab Ye Tian.

For him, capturing a half-step domain ancestor was simply too simple a matter.

However, at this moment, a golden thread instantly penetrated his big hand and then through his body.

At this moment, it was Ye Tian who performed the Golden Silk Saint Technique.

Of course, Ye Tian kept his hand and didn't kill him, otherwise he would not be able to stop Ye Tian's Golden Silk Saint Technique at all, and he would be killed in an instant.

The Ancestor of the Thousand Variations Domain did not die, but he was also severely damaged.

Then.

Ye Tian performed another holy technique - the Five Elements Ban!

This sacred technique can seal the power of others.

Airplanes!

The ancestor of the Thousand Variations Domain was banned by the Five Elements, and all the power in his body was sealed, and he had no power to resist at all.

With his strength, he couldn't break through the Holy Technique power of the Five Elements Seal at all, and he could only become Ye Tian's subordinate prisoner.

"How so?"

The Thousand Variations Domain Ancestor was dumbfounded.

A Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor hit him hard with one move, and sealed his cultivation strength with the second move.

Is this still a half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm?

"You are the ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws!!!"

The Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor exclaimed.

"That's right, it's me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor smiled bitterly, in fact, when they came to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, they also inquired about the powerhouses of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, but when someone said that the strongest person in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm was the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, and his strength was much stronger than the Domain Ancestor, and even the Elite Domain Ancestor was not an opponent, he didn't believe it at all.

In his opinion, the people in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm have too little knowledge, and they don't know what an elite domain ancestor is.

Therefore, he did not take this news seriously at all.

Now, he knows that the news is true, and he has paid the price.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, I haven't offended you, why are you dealing with me? Please, let me go!"

The Ancestor of the Thousand Variations Domain begged for mercy.

"The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm has recently lost some half-step domain ancestors, and our human race has also lost a half-step domain ancestor, what do you say?"

Ye Tian's voice turned cold.

"I didn't do it!" The Thousand Variations Domain Ancestor hurriedly said, "It must have been done by the other four Domain Ancestors!"

"There are also four domain ancestors, which four?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Six Extremes Domain Ancestor, Cangyan Domain Ancestor, Tianyin Domain Ancestor, and Moyu Domain Ancestor, must be one of them who killed your Terran Half-Step Domain Ancestor, I really didn't do it!" explained the Thousand Variations Domain Ancestor.

"Where are they?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Still in the War Tower!"

Ancestral Dao of the Thousand Variations Domain.

"I got it!"

Ye Tian threw the Thousand Transformations Domain Ancestor into the space hall of the universe in his body, but he had no strength to resist, and he couldn't escape.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to squat outside the Battle Realm Tower, and the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor, Cangyan Domain Ancestor, Tianyin Domain Ancestor, and Moyu Domain Ancestor came out of the Battle Realm Tower one by one, and they were all easily captured by Ye Tian and printed them one by one.

These five elite domain ancestors were all half-step domain ancestors who did not admit that they had killed the human race, but Ye Tian knew very well that it must have been one of them who did it, and the half-step domain ancestor who disappeared in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm must have been committed by the five of them.

Therefore, these five people cannot stay!

--------------------

Outside the human realm.

A half-step domain ancestor came here one after another, and even the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master also came here as an incarnation.

Because Ye Tian announced that he had captured the culprit who kept missing the half-step domain ancestors of the Xuanxu Taboo Realm, it was the five elite domain ancestors, and today he wanted to kill these five domain ancestors outside the human realm to avenge the missing and fallen half-step domain ancestors in the Xuanxu Taboo Realm.

As soon as this news came out, many people were shocked, and even the Lord of Fengshan Mountain came.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared, and with a wave, five elite domain ancestors who had been sealed with their power appeared.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, please, let me go!"

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, we really didn't kill your Terran Half-Step Domain Ancestor!"

"I didn't do it, I was really wronged!"

These elite domain ancestors begged for mercy one by one, completely lacking the demeanor of domain ancestors.

Abrupt.

They saw the Wind Mountain Lord, and one of them happened to know the Wind Mountain Lord.

"Wind Mountain Lord, Wanfa Dao Ancestor is your half-step Domain Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, you can quickly persuade him, don't let him kill me, I am Shi Jing Domain Ancestor's subordinate. Wind Mountain Lord, you should know the strength of the Stone Crystal Domain Ancestor!" the Six Extremes Domain Ancestor said.

"Six Extremes Domain Ancestor, I can't persuade you!"

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain shook his head.
